note: Season-Strategy is a planning deliverable, not an episode. Fictional brand; never a fleet client.
jobKeyFormula: pd- plus contactId plus first 16 hex of sha256 of the canonical submission

fields.podcast_survey_goal: Plan a first season that turns our roastery regulars into a community and generates warm leads without ever feeling like an advertisement.
fields.podcast_survey_stories: Almost quit before the first wholesale account said yes; a regular suggested the house blend; grew fastest the season we spent least on strangers; removed the loyalty points program and loyalty deepened.
fields.podcast_survey__additional_info: Owner wants a mix of solo founder episodes and guest interviews with local makers; SHUA framing for every guest.
